name: Peas Kofta Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind peas to a paste (or process in a food processor fitted with a steel blade).
2. Add gram flour, poppy seeds, onion, coriander, ginger, chilies, and salt; knead or process until smooth.
3. Roll dough into small balls and deep fry until golden brown. Drain and set aside.
4. Grind onion and garlic to a paste.
5. Fry in 2 tablespoons ghee or oil until golden brown.
6. Add coriander, garam masala, salt, and chili powder; cook for 1 minute.
7. Add tomatoes; continue cooking until tomatoes are soft and ghee (or oil) separates from the mixture.
8. Add potatoes; cook for 3 more minutes.
9. Add 2 cups water to the pan, then bring to a boil.
10. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are almost done.
11. Add koftas and chilies; continue cooking until potatoes are tender.
12. Garnish with additional garam masala and coriander leaves.
